title: Farmer's Delight Compat
description: Remove duplicate items and blocks with the goal of integrating Farmer's Delight and other similar mods so they work as if they were a single mod!
body:
**The goal of these compat mods I'm making is to make mods work better together in modpacks by removing duplicate items, mobs, and blocks. It ensures that anything dependent on the removed items, mobs and blocks still works by redirecting those dependencies to the remaining equivalent items, mobs and blocks.**
## List of mods included
- Farmer's Delight
- Miner's Delight
- Cultural Delights
- Supplementaries
- Haunted Harvest
- Naturalist
## List of changes
### Removed Duplicate Items
- Cultural Delights Cooked Calamari
- Cultural Delights Raw Calamari
- Cultural Delights Squid
- Cultural Delights Cooked Squid
- Cultural Delights Glow Squid
- Cultural Delights Corn Cob
- Cultural Delights Corn Cob Crate
- Cultural Delights Corn Kernels
- Cultural Delights Popcorn
- Naturalist Cooked Egg
- Supplementaries Rope
### Removed Duplicate Blocks
- Cultural Delights Wild Corn

### Crafting Recipe Adjustments
- Naturalist Duck Egg will now be cooked into Farmer's Delight Fried Egg
- All Cultural Delights recipes that take used to take Cultural Delight's Corn now use Haunted Harvest's Corn
- Cultural Delights Calamari Roll is now made using Miner's Delight Tentacles
- All Supplementaries recipes that used to take Supplementaries Rope now use Farmer's Delight Rope
### Loot Table Adjustments
- Squids won't drop Cultural Delights Squid
- Glow Squids won't drop Cultural Delights Glow Squid
